document.title: 510(k) Cover Letter – General Information
authorityOrJurisdiction: Center for Devices and Radiological Health
standards: Information required in a Premarket Notification Submission

sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co. Ltd. submitted a traditional 510(k) notification for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB Portable X-ray Systems to FDA CDRH.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a 510(k) cover letter providing general submission information, device identification, classification, predicate device, submitter, correspondent, confidentiality request, panel, and reason for submission.
keyPoints: The device trade names are HnX-P1 and HnX-PB.
The common name and classification name are Portable X-ray System.
The primary product code is IZL, regulation number is 21 CFR 892.1720, and device class is Class II.
The predicate device is K182207, TR90BH manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The panel is Radiology and the reason for submission is New Device.

entities.name: H&abyz Co. Ltd.
entities.evidence: A paper copy of the signed cover letter and one valid e-Star are submitted by H&abyz Co. Ltd.

concepts.name: Confidential commercial information
concepts.evidence: § Confidentiality: H&abyz Co., Ltd. considers our intent to market the device as confidential commercial information and request that it be considered as such by FDA.

evidence.claim: The document date is April 10, 2025.

evidence.claim: The submission was addressed to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration Center for Devices and Radiological Health.

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co. Ltd. is submitting a traditional 510(k) notification.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz Co. Ltd. is submitting this traditional 510(k) notification.

evidence.claim: The purpose of the submission is to establish equivalency to other legally marketed devices.
evidence.evidenceText: The purpose of this submission is to establish the equivalency of the product to other legally marketed devices and provide documentation demonstrating such equivalency.

evidence.claim: The information is provided in conformance with 21 CFR 807.87 and FDA guidance titled Information required in a Premarket Notification Submission.
evidence.evidenceText: The following information is being provided in conformance with 21 CFR 807.87 and the FDA guidance documents entitled: ‘Information required in a Premarket Notification Submission’

reviewFlags.reason: The Design and Use of the Device table contains checkmarks, but OCR text does not preserve whether each mark is under the Yes or No column.
Revision value Rev2 is present in the sourcePath filename, not in the visible extracted page text.
The source text does not provide an FDA-assigned 510(k) number for the subject HnX-P1/HnX-PB submission.
